# Opinafy - Plataforma de Testimonios en Espanol

## About
Opinafy is the first Spanish-native platform for collecting, managing, and displaying verified customer testimonials. Founded in 2026.

## Key Features
- Embeddable testimonial widgets (Shadow DOM, no CSS conflicts, ~25KB)
- 7 widget layouts: grid, masonry, carousel, list, ticker, badge, FOMO popup
- 80+ customizable widget templates (including 15 creative)
- 30 mini site templates by profession
- Email-verified testimonials
- Automatic company verification (email domain matching)
- Double verification (email + company) for maximum credibility
- Video testimonials recorded from browser webcam
- Audio testimonials (all plans)
- Photo testimonials (all plans)
- 4 video display modes (inline, modal, gallery, thumbnail)
- Public mini testimonial sites with custom URL
- Import from 7 platforms (Google Maps, TripAdvisor, Trustpilot, Facebook, Yelp, Capterra, G2)
- A/B testing with analytics
- Conversion analytics (impressions, clicks, conversions)
- Sentiment analysis optimized for Spanish
- Health Score (free website analyzer)
- Certification tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum)
- Verified badge (dynamic SVG)
- Ranking / Leaderboard
- Testimonial request automation (scheduled emails)
- 6 pre-built email request templates
- AI Social Post Generator (5 social media formats)
- FOMO Popup widget
- Smart widget with data-tags filtering
- Webhooks (Zapier, Make, n8n)
- Owner reply to testimonials
- Featured/pinned testimonials
- PDF export
- QR codes and WhatsApp sharing for collection
- ROI Calculator
- In-app notifications
- Public changelog
- WordPress, Shopify, PrestaShop, WooCommerce plugins
- REST API
- GDPR compliant with cookie consent
- Bilingual dashboard (Spanish + English)
- 421 city + industry SEO pages

## Pricing
- Free: 1 project, 10 testimonials, 2 layouts, audio, photo, sentiment analysis, Health Score
- Mini Site (EUR 5/month): 1 project, 20 testimonials, mini site, 30 templates by profession
- Pro (EUR 9/month): 3 projects, unlimited testimonials, all layouts, FOMO popup, A/B testing, import, automation, AI social posts, webhooks, PDF export, 6 email templates, no branding
- Business (EUR 19/month): unlimited projects, video, 80 templates, certification badge, ranking, 4 video modes, smart widget, owner reply, featured testimonials, 3 team seats

## URLs
- Homepage: https://opinafy.com
- English: https://opinafy.com/en
- Blog: https://opinafy.com/blog (80+ articles about testimonials and social proof)
- Templates: https://opinafy.com/plantillas (80 widget designs)
- Industries: https://opinafy.com/testimonios-para (160 industry-specific pages)
- Pricing: https://opinafy.com/precios
- Comparisons: https://opinafy.com/comparar
- Features: https://opinafy.com/caracteristicas
- Health Score: https://opinafy.com/health-score
- ROI Calculator: https://opinafy.com/calculadora-roi
